description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped with trees and grass. The front features a driveway leading to an attached garage, a walkway to the main entrance, and a small lawn with a tree and a play structure. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with a patio area, a pool, and additional greenery, providing ample outdoor living space. The roof is flat with slight overhangs, and the exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or siding. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with larger panes facing the backyard and smaller ones on the sides. The main entryway is modest, with a single door and a small stoop, lacking elaborate columns or porches.
description: A single-story suburban house with a flat roof, attached garage, fenced yard, and a backyard featuring a patio and pool. The exterior is light-colored with asymmetrical windows and simple landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, front lawn, and two trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced boundary, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, patio area, and dense landscaping along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional fencing, and the rear patio and pool area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single-door entry with a small stoop, no porch or columns, and minimal decorative elements.
